productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Golden Yellow HandBag
description: Created for the woman of sophistication, this handbag from spice art is crafted from the finest material and in fashionable designs to give you that stylish edge. Made of printed synthetic leather with a flower design and crystal embellishment on the front Magnetic button closure with a zippered pouch, mobile pouch and organiser space inside One handle in synthetic leather Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dirt
